messages.subject: [R-gui] block selection (Mac)
messages.body_plain:
Dear list members,

A really nice feature of R GUI (Mac) that I'm missing a lot is block selection which allows you to select any blocks of output from R by press & hold the option key. This feature stopped working after version 2.14.1. Would be very grateful if you could bring it back in the coming updates. 

Many thanks,
Yang

messages.subject: [R-gui] block selection (Mac)
messages.body_plain:
On Jul 27, 2012, at 14:41 , Yang Xia wrote:

> Dear list members,
> 
> A really nice feature of R GUI (Mac) that I'm missing a lot is block selection which allows you to select any blocks of output from R by press & hold the option key. This feature stopped working after version 2.14.1. Would be very grateful if you could bring it back in the coming updates. 
> 

I think you probably want R-sig-mac for this. In which way is "block selection" different from the shift-alt-arrow selection mechanism (which does work for me in 2.15.1)?

-pd

> Many thanks,
> Yang
> 
> _______________________________________________
> R-SIG-GUI mailing list
> R-SIG-GUI at r-project.org
> https://stat.ethz.ch/mailman/listinfo/r-sig-gui

-- 
Peter Dalgaard, Professor,
Center for Statistics, Copenhagen Business School
Solbjerg Plads 3, 2000 Frederiksberg, Denmark
Phone: (+45)38153501
Email: pd.mes at cbs.dk  Priv: PDalgd at gmail.com

messages.subject: [R-gui] block selection (Mac)
messages.body_plain:
On Jul 27, 2012, at 14:41 , Yang Xia wrote:

> A really nice feature of R GUI (Mac) that I'm missing a lot is block selection which allows you to select any blocks of output from R by press & hold the option key. This feature stopped working after version 2.14.1. Would be very grateful if you could bring it back in the coming updates. 

This bug was fixed and will be part of the next release.

Cheers,
--Hans
